recurring.title: International Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking
recurring.note: Important international awareness day for thoughtful Melody4U content. Use hopeful, supportive language and avoid fearmongering, shock visuals, or graphic imagery.
recurring.marketing_angle: thoughtful awareness message with hope and support
recurring.why_selected: A main international significant day in the target week; serious topics should be handled with awareness tone, not skipped.

recurring.title: Memorial Day for Victims of the Communist Regime / Political Prisoners
recurring.note: Czech memorial day requiring calm, dignified and respectful visual language. No hype, no sensationalism, and no disturbing imagery.
recurring.marketing_angle: respectful remembrance for a Czech audience
recurring.why_selected: A major Czech memorial day in the target week; it should be included with respectful memorial tone rather than ignored.

recurring.title: St. John’s Day / Jan / midsummer mood
recurring.note: Czech seasonal and name-day friendly moment, useful as a softer secondary significant-day theme.
recurring.why_selected: A Czech tradition and name-day mood can support a warm Melody4U greeting if capacity remains.
